---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for SonarAI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: sanchez314c
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about behavior and UI placement.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they're less ideal.

## Context

Any additional context. If this involves a new lyrics source, include the site URL and an example search. If this involves the IPC API, describe the new channel and expected params/return types.
